case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. LUCIA A. PAULAZZO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAULAZZO, LUCIA A. $7,903.36 PRINCIPAL, $794.67 INTEREST, $282.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,980.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
